headline: Viking Global's Top Five Stock Bets
summary: Viking Global Investors is an elite hedge fund run by former Tiger Cub Andreas Halvorsen. The Norwegian billionaire has a nearly unparalleled track record of success in the often fickle stock-picking game. Undoubtedly, much of this can be attributed to his tutelage under Julian Robertson at Tiger Management in the 1990s.
